title: Plans & Pricing
subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your growth stage

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For freelancers and small businesses starting their journey.
starter.tagline: The ideal starting point for clarity and control.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Built for those who need daily predictability, less rework and more speed.

advanced.name: Advanced
advanced.description: Focused on volume, control and larger teams. More flexibility, more autonomy, more operational capacity.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Complete infrastructure for demanding operations. Ideal for large agencies and structured companies.

premium.name: Premium Loquia
premium.description: Loquia's expert team executes everything for you. You just track the results.
premium.tagline: Your marketing operations led by experienced professionals.

questions.question: Can I change plans anytime?
questions.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes are applied immediately.

questions.question: Is there a free trial?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all paid plans. No credit card required.

questions.question: How does support work?
questions.answer: All plans include email support. Professional and higher plans have priority support with guaranteed response times.

questions.question: Can I cancel anytime?
questions.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. There are no cancellation fees or penalties.
